style_name: Folded Diamond Perspective Type Poster Style
summary: A bold minimalist editorial poster style using low-angle hero photography inside a diamond aperture, folded tan paper or canvas planes, and oversized white perspective typography printed across the lower surface.
prompt_template:
Create an image in folded-diamond-perspective-type-poster-style.

Aspect ratio: {ASPECT_RATIO}.

Scene: {SUBJECT} {SUBJECT_ACTION}, interacting with {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}, in {LOCATION}. Use {WARDROBE_STYLE}. Shoot the subject as a real-photo low-angle hero image with wide-lens foreshortening, strong sunlight, and a bright cyan sky or clean outdoor backdrop.

Layout: place the photo inside a large rotated square diamond aperture in the upper half of a tactile folded tan paper or linen canvas surface. Include {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Create a deep central fold or crease running down from the diamond point into the lower poster.

Typography: set the main headline "{MAIN_TEXT}" in enormous white ultra-bold condensed sans-serif type across the lower half. Make the type feel printed onto the folded surface, split by the central crease, distorted by perspective, cropped by the poster edges, and lightly textured by the paper grain. Add "{SECONDARY_TEXT}" only as tiny clean editorial microcopy using {ACCENT_SYMBOL}.

Mood and finish: bold minimalism, streetwear editorial, monumental confidence, warm tan cardstock texture, crisp sunlight, cyan sky contrast, soft shadows, printed-paper grain, sharp geometric photo crop. Avoid watermarks, usernames, QR codes, creator IDs, platform logos, and app marks.
negative_prompt: busy collage, many photos, eye-level portrait, small headline, thin serif typography, playful rounded type, glossy 3D letters, neon gradients, corporate brochure, clean vector-only design, flat background with no paper grain, crowded secondary text, watermark, username, creator ID, QR code, platform logo, app interface marks

variables.SUBJECT: main person, athlete, dancer, model, musician, founder, maker, or product hero
variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: standing over the camera, stepping forward, crouching above the viewer, reaching downward, jumping, holding a prop, or looking down with confidence
variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: shoe, skateboard, basketball, camera, bag, bottle, instrument, notebook, tool, or featured product
variables.LOCATION: open sky, rooftop, court, desert road, studio courtyard, skate spot, beach, or clean outdoor setting
variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: folded tan paper, cardboard, linen canvas, central crease, shadowed hinge, diamond aperture, subtle grain
variables.MAIN_TEXT: huge bold headline in white condensed type
variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: tiny clean editorial metadata or short supporting phrase
variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: thin vertical separator, small slash, tiny dot, minimal rule, or small geometric marker
variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: monochrome streetwear, white denim, oversized shirt, athletic layers, minimal sneakers, or tonal editorial styling

variables.SUBJECT: a young basketball player
variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: stepping over the camera while holding a ball low
variables.LOCATION: an outdoor court under clear sky
variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: folded tan canvas paper, a diamond aperture, a central crease, warm shadows, and subtle woven grain
variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: white mesh jersey, cream track pants, and minimal high-top sneakers

example_cases.prompt_16x9: Create a horizontal 16:9 image in folded-diamond-perspective-type-poster-style. Scene: a young basketball player stepping over the camera while holding a ball low, wearing a white mesh jersey, cream track pants, and minimal high-top sneakers, on an outdoor court under clear sky. Shoot the subject as a real-photo low-angle hero image with wide-lens foreshortening, strong sunlight, and bright cyan sky. Place the photo inside a large rotated square diamond aperture near the upper center of a tactile folded tan canvas paper surface. Spread the folded planes wide across the frame with a central crease, warm shadows, and subtle woven grain. Set the headline "RISE UP" in enormous white ultra-bold condensed sans-serif type across the lower half and right side, printed onto the folded planes, split by the crease, distorted by perspective, and cropped by the frame edges. Add tiny clean microcopy reading "bold motion / daily practice" with a thin vertical separator. Bold minimalism, streetwear sports editorial, monumental confidence, printed-paper texture. Avoid watermarks, usernames, QR codes, creator IDs, platform logos, and app marks.

Shoot the subject as a real-photo low-angle hero image with wide-lens foreshortening, strong sunlight, and bright cyan sky. Place the photo inside a large rotated square diamond aperture in the upper half of a tactile folded tan canvas paper surface. Include a central crease dropping from the diamond point, warm shadows, and subtle woven grain. Set the headline "RISE UP" in enormous white ultra-bold condensed sans-serif type across the lower half, printed onto the folded planes, split by the crease, distorted by perspective, and cropped by the poster edges. Add tiny clean microcopy reading "bold motion / daily practice" with a thin vertical separator. Bold minimalism, streetwear sports editorial, monumental confidence, printed-paper texture. Avoid watermarks, usernames, QR codes, creator IDs, platform logos, and app marks.
